title: Sales Executive (North/Construction)
description:
📍 Location: North

🕒 Work Hours: 5 days work week (Mon-Fri 9am-6pm)

💰 Salary: Up to $3,800

Our client is an established construction firm known for quality workmanship, timely project delivery, and reliable collaboration with their partners.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Develop new business opportunities through networking, cold calling, and market research.
  • Maintain and expand existing client accounts while ensuring strong customer satisfaction.
  • Prepare and present sales proposals, quotations, and presentations to clients.
  • Meet or exceed monthly and quarterly sales targets.
  • Coordinate with project and operations teams for smooth project handover and execution.
  • Track market trends, competitor activities, and customer feedback to refine sales strategies.
  • Represent the company at trade shows, exhibitions, and industry events.
  • Prepare and submit regular sales reports and forecasts to management.


Job Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Sales, Business, Marketing, or a related discipline.
  • Minimum 2 years of sales experience, preferably in construction, building materials, or related sectors.
  • Familiarity with metal roofing, decking, or structural systems.
  • Strong, self-motivated sales professional with excellent communication and negotiation skills and a proven ability to exceed targets independently.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint).
  • Valid Class 3 driving license is an advantage.


To apply, kindly click APPLY NOW to submit your latest CV.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.



SAAY

EA Registration No.: R25139436

EA License No.: 25C2695

postedCompany.description:
At Search Avenue Pte Ltd, we believe recruitment is more than just filling positions — it’s about building futures. Founded by two passionate individuals with over 12 years of recruitment experience, Search Avenue was born out of a shared vision: to raise the standards of recruitment through integrity, innovation, and unwavering dedication to people.

We are deeply committed to understanding the evolving needs of both employers and candidates. Our approach combines advanced technology with a human touch, ensuring personalized, efficient, and meaningful hiring experiences. Whether it’s permanent placements, executive searches, or talent mapping, our mission remains the same — to connect top-tier talent with companies that value diversity, capability, and culture fit.

Driven by our founders’ belief in work-life harmony, we champion flexible career opportunities and inclusive workplaces. Our goal is to empower individuals to thrive in their careers while honoring their personal commitments — and to help businesses grow stronger through passionate, high-performing teams.

At Search Avenue, recruitment is our craft — and people are our purpose.
postedCompany.name: SEARCH AVENUE PRIVATE LIMITED
